PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANSELMO, PHILLIP E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC COAST SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANSELMO, PHILLIP E. $94.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $134.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-22-1999, GRANTED

IS VACATED NUNC PRO TUNC AS IF NEVER TAKEN (AB INITIO). ORDER SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER KAPLAN.
